overall.description: Cinematic game footage from Skyrim showing a dragon perched on a snowy mountain peak during a violent storm. The dragon takes flight and soars away into the stormy sky, leaving the desolate winter landscape as the camera continues to pan across the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain peak with ancient dragon

agents.ego_description: stationary camera slowly panning around the dragon perched on the mountain peak

notable_agents.action: large dragon perched on rocky outcrop, occasionally moving head and looking around

entered.detail: large green-scaled dragon with horns, spikes, and tattered wings
snow-covered rocky mountain summit under dark storm clouds

segments.scene_description: A massive dragon perches on a snowy mountain peak during a violent winter storm. The camera slowly pans around the stationary creature, revealing the desolate, windswept landscape of jagged rocks and snow-covered terrain under dark, turbulent skies.

events.description: dragon spreads wings and takes flight into the stormy sky, exiting the frame

agents.ego_description: camera continues panning across the empty mountain landscape after the dragon departs

entered.detail: snow-covered ridge line fading into storm clouds and mist

segments.scene_description: The dragon launches into the air and soars away into the storm, leaving the frame empty. The camera continues its slow pan across the desolate, snow-covered mountain terrain, revealing misty ridges and jagged cliffs poking through the drifting snow and low clouds.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a focal point on a massive creature and expands into a wide, desolate mountain vista. It begins by slowly panning around a dragon perched atop a snowy peak, capturing the creature against a backdrop of jagged rocks and turbulent, dark skies. As the dragon launches into the air and soars away into the storm, the frame opens up to reveal the vastness of the windswept landscape. The camera then continues its steady sweep across the empty terrain, shifting focus toward misty ridges and jagged cliffs that poke through drifting snow and low clouds.
